name: Cursor Pro
summary: Cursor Pro IDE adds real-time collaboration and autonomous code search
core_positioning: AI-first code editor with real-time collaboration for distributed teams
problem_it_solves: Pair programming and code review friction in distributed development
user_visibility: Immediate: users can activate in settings
access_barrier_change: Free tier unlocked for up to 2 collaborators
workflow_change: Enables async collaborative coding without context switching to chat tools
new_product_form: Native IDE feature (not browser tab or desktop app)
interaction_pattern: Presence indicators + shared cursor + code suggestions

name: Midjourney Web Studio
summary: Midjourney Web Studio launched: full image generation and editing in browser, no Discord required
core_positioning: First-class web interface for image generation (Discord no longer required)
problem_it_solves: Discord is not a design tool; requires context switching
user_visibility: Available to all paid subscribers (launch day)
access_barrier_change: Removes Discord dependency barrier; web-native access
workflow_change: Enables single-app workflows for creators (prompt → iterate → export)
new_product_form: Native web application with real-time canvas editing
interaction_pattern: Drag-drop prompts, in-browser upscaling, inpainting, style transfer

good: Finally feels like a real design tool

name: Claude Code Sync
summary: Claude Code Sync: bi-directional code sync between Claude Projects and local IDE (VSCode, JetBrains)
core_positioning: Seamless bridge between AI assistant and local dev environment
problem_it_solves: Manual copy-paste between Claude and IDE is friction
user_visibility: Available now for Claude Teams subscribers
workflow_change: Enables AI-assisted coding without leaving IDE; reduces context fragmentation
interaction_pattern: Toggle sync, IDE reflects Claude project state, changes push back
user_scenarios: Testing Claude suggestions without leaving IDE

name: AI Photo Enhancer (Startup)
summary: PixelGenius: one-click batch photo enhancement (upscaling, color, denoise) powered by open-source Flux model
core_positioning: Desktop-first photo batch processing, no cloud uploads required (local Flux)
problem_it_solves: Batch photo enhancement usually requires cloud upload + subscription
workflow_change: Bulk enhance photos offline, integrates with photo libraries
new_product_form: Electron app with local model inference
interaction_pattern: Drag folder → set enhancement level → export
user_scenarios: Batch enhance photo library before archival
Real estate agent bulk process listings
business_model: $49 one-time purchase (perpetual license) + optional cloud backup ($99/year)
